title: 2026 AI Engineer Vibe Reel
summary: The AI Engineer channel is promoting a World's Fair event scheduled for June 29 to July 2 in San Francisco. The post invites viewers to get tickets and view the event schedule.
writeup: This video from the AI Engineer channel promotes the 2026 AI Engineer World's Fair, scheduled for June 29 to July 2 in San Francisco. It directs viewers to obtain tickets and review the event schedule. The clip functions as event promotion rather than technical instruction, so the concrete takeaways are the dates, the location, and the calls to register and check the agenda.
